conversation.content:
This call is being recorded. I am an AI collections agent acting on behalf of Riverline.

Here is the offer: a down payment of ₹13,500, followed by ₹7,650 per month for 10 months. This offer is valid until April 26th. Can you commit to this today?
The offer is a down payment of ₹13,500, followed by ₹7,650 per month for 10 months. This expires April 26th. Can you commit to this today?
The payment is ₹13,500 down, then ₹7,650 per month for 10 months. Deadline is April 26th. Can you commit to this today?
Actually, I'm having some family emergencies and medical issues. I don't think I'll be able to pay this month.
I can flag your account for hardship review. This pauses the current process. Do you want me to do that?
What will happen in hardship review?
A hardship review assesses your situation for potential adjusted terms or a temporary pause on collection activity. Do you want me to flag your account for hardship review?
Your account is now flagged for hardship review. This pauses the current collection process. A specialist will contact you within 5-7 business days to discuss your situation.
